items.title: Goldman Sachs Reveals $2.3 Billion Crypto Investment, Including Bitcoin and XRP
items.description: Goldman Sachs disclosed millions invested in XRP and Solana, alongside Bitcoin and Ether, in its Q4 2025 SEC filing.

items.title: Chinese AI IPOs Surge as JPMorgan, Goldman Initiate Coverage; MiniMax Jumps 230%
items.description: JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs back newly listed Chinese AI developers and chipmakers amid strong investor demand in Hong Kong.

items.title: How Investors May Respond To Goldman Sachs Group (GS) Aggressive Bond Issuance And AI Efficiency Push
items.description: In recent weeks, Goldman Sachs Group has been highly active in the bond market, issuing a wide range of senior fixed and floating-rate notes across different maturities, coupons, and structures to diversify its funding base. This financing push comes alongside strong investment banking and asset and wealth management activity, as well as new AI-driven efficiency initiatives co-developed with Anthropic, underscoring how Goldman Sachs is reshaping its business mix and operations. We’ll now...

items.title: Google sells $32B in debt, Goldman Sachs CEO sees software rebound
items.description: Yahoo Finance Senior Producer John Hyland tracks Tuesday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. At the UBS Financial Services Conference, Goldman Sachs (GS) CEO David Solomon said many software (IGV) companies will recover from the sector's sell-off. Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL) has reportedly already sold nearly $32 billion in bonds, according to Bloomberg, as the artificial intelligence (AI) funding race continues. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.
